F

Pool Settings

Back
Network Settings
Port for miners to connect (requires restart)
Pool Configuration
VoidCoin address for pool fees and block rewards
Display name for your pool
Text embedded in mined blocks (max 20 chars)
Fee Settings
Fee deducted from block rewards (0-10%)
Minimum balance required for payout (0.1-1000)
Advanced Settings
Minimum share difficulty for miners (1024-500000, requires restart)
